TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Bigelow sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Bob Bigelow, Squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bob Bigelow htagan beh sa Boston Massachusetts. hiya ga mnaki Pennsylvania hopa pqwasan biru mzyu mari. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 18,Bob Bigelow wal mhuilq la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ő≤oő≤ ő≤i…£elow s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, ő≤oő≤ ő≤i…£elow, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. qnxan nja ő≤oő≤ ő≤i…£elow ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa ő≤os~…ēton mas~…ēs~…ēa ¶~ ®ńßus~…ēetts~…ē. ńßija …£a mnaki penns~…ējl*ania ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru mzju mari. kawas~…ē taj ****,rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **,ő≤oő≤ ő≤i…£elow wal mńßuilq la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Bob Bigelow sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Bob Bigelow, Squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bob Bigelow htagan beh sa Boston Massachusetts. hiya ga mnaki Pennsylvania hopa pqwasan biru mzyu mari. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 18,Bob Bigelow wal mhuilq la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
